team_name: VyaparaSetu: Connecting Karnataka’s Business Systems through Event Driven Middleware
summary: Design a layer that propagates service requests both ways between Karnataka's Single Window System and the legacy department systems, using the Unique Business Identifier (UBID) as the common join key.
key_steps: Converts updates from any system into standardized events
Uses UBID as the single linking key
Propagates updates across systems through an event-driven pipeline
Ensures data consistency, reliability, and traceability
optimization_claims: Conflict detection & resolution using configurable rules
Full auditability (who changed what, when, and where)
